changes_made: Changed k8s_networkpolicy_tls_enforced to k8s_networkpolicy_tls_required for clarity
review_notes: The functions generally map well to the control PM-17-b, which focuses on protecting information on external systems. The use of TLS for securing communications and validating audit logs are appropriate measures. However, the naming of 'k8s_networkpolicy_tls_enforced' was slightly ambiguous, and changing it to 'k8s_networkpolicy_tls_required' improves clarity and consistency with naming conventions.
naming_improvements: Use 'required' instead of 'enforced' for clarity in k8s_networkpolicy_tls_required
title: Protecting Controlled Unclassified Information On External Systems - Review and update the policy...
step1_reasoning: The control PM-17-b focuses on protecting information on external systems, which can be mapped to ensuring secure communication and logging in Kubernetes. This includes enforcing TLS for API server communications, validating audit logs, enforcing TLS in network policies, and ensuring TLS is enabled for ingress traffic. These checks collectively help in securing data in transit and maintaining integrity of logs.
